metadata.name: 09_超级综合测试流
metadata.description: 涵盖大部分节点类型的超长链路复合测试流

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 400}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["user_input"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_assign", "type": "variable_assignment", "position": {"x": 350, "y": 400}, "data": {"config": {"assignments": [{"variable_name": "status", "value_type": "string", "value": "pending"}]}}, "label": "初始化变量"}, {"id": "node_intent", "type": "intent_classifier", "position": {"x": 600, "y": 400}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "intents": [{"name": "询问天气", "value": "weather", "targetRoute": "node_tool_weather"}, {"name": "复杂任务", "value": "task", "targetRoute": "node_human"}], "inputVariable": "{user_input}", "outputVariable": "intent"}}, "label": "意图识别"}, {"id": "node_tool_weather", "type": "tool_executor", "position": {"x": 900, "y": 200}, "data": {"config": {"toolCode": "mock_weather_api", "argumentsJson": "{\"location\": \"北京\"}", "outputVariable": "weather_res"}}, "label": "天气查询"}, {"id": "node_human", "type": "human_input", "position": {"x": 900, "y": 600}, "data": {"config": {"approvalMessage": "是否允许执行复杂任务？", "outputVariable": "approval_res"}}, "label": "人工审批"}, {"id": "node_cond", "type": "condition", "position": {"x": 1200, "y": 600}, "data": {"config": {"expression": "approval_res == True", "trueRoute": "node_batch", "falseRoute": "node_end"}}, "label": "审批判断"}, {"id": "node_batch", "type": "batch_processor", "position": {"x": 1500, "y": 500}, "data": {"config": {"arrayVariable": "['task1', 'task2', 'task3']", "itemVariable": "task", "concurrency": 3}}, "label": "批量处理"}, {"id": "loop_body_group", "type": "loop_body_group", "position": {"x": 1500, "y": 600}, "data": {"config": {}}, "label": "处理组", "style": {"width": "300px", "height": "200px"}}, {"id": "node_loop_tool", "type": "tool_executor", "position": {"x": 50, "y": 50}, "data": {"config": {"toolCode": "mock_tool", "argumentsJson": "{\"task\": \"{{ variables.task }}\"}", "outputVariable": "task_res"}}, "label": "执行任务", "parentNode": "loop_body_group", "extent": "parent"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 1900, "y": 400}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "done", "type": "string", "value": "true", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_assign", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_assign", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_assign_node_intent", "type": "default", "source": "node_assign", "target": "node_intent", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_intent_node_tool_weather_intent_0", "type": "default", "source": "node_intent", "target": "node_tool_weather", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "intent_0"}, {"id": "edge_node_intent_node_human_intent_1", "type": "default", "source": "node_intent", "target": "node_human", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}, "sourceHandle": "intent_1"}, {"id": "edge_node_intent_node_end_default", "type": "default", "value_type": "string", "value": "pending"}]}}, {"id": "node_intent", "type": "intent_classifier", "name": "意图识别", "config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "intents": [{"name": "询问天气", "value": "weather", "targetRoute": "node_tool_weather"}, {"name": "复杂任务", "value": "task", "targetRoute": "node_human"}], "inputVariable": "{user_input}", "outputVariable": "intent"}}, {"id": "node_tool_weather", "type": "tool_executor", "name": "天气查询", "config": {"toolCode": "mock_weather_api", "argumentsJson": "{\"location\": \"北京\"}", "outputVariable": "weather_res"}}, {"id": 'task2', 'task3']", "itemVariable": "task", "concurrency": 3}}, {"id": "loop_body_group", "type": "loop_body_group", "name": "处理组", "config": {}, "style": {"width": "300px", "height": "200px"}}, "parentNode": "loop_body_group", "extent": "parent"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "done", "type": "string", "value": "true", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_assign", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_assign", "target": "node_intent", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_intent", "target": "node_tool_weather", "type": "default", "condition": "", "sourceHandle": "intent_0"}, {"source": "node_intent", "target": "node_human", "type": "loop_body_group", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "loop_body_group", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}]}
